name: User opens a conversation from yesterday; chat header is fresh, history scrolls to bottom, composer focuses
description: Coming back to a stale thread — opens to the right state without confusion. Chat header (the live ChatHeaderLive island) reflects the current customer + contract status, NOT yesterday's snapshot. Scroll auto-pins to the bottom on first paint; composer auto-focuses for typing.

persona.name: Diego
persona.role: Back at the desk after a job
persona.context: Last night drafted a quote for the Hernandez deck; didn't lock it.

preconditions: Thread { id: T, customer: Hernandez, lastMessage: 23h ago, has draft Quote D }

steps.action: Clicks the Hernandez thread in the sidebar
steps.expect: Route navigates to /assistant/T; chat scroll is pinned to the bottom (last message visible without manual scroll); ChatHeaderLive renders 'Hernandez K. / Quote drafted · review'

steps.action: Scrolls up to read yesterday's exchange
steps.expect: Scroll-position-tracking flag flips to 'not near bottom'; new message arrivals do NOT yank the scroll back
ResizeObserver detects nearBottom again; auto-pin re-enables for future arrivals
create_quote handler updates Quote D in-place (existing draft, status='draft' → updated); thread preview reflects the new summary

evaluationCriteria.check: Chat header doesn't briefly show 'New conversation' before swapping to the bound customer name; the live event keeps it accurate from the first paint
User picks up exactly where they left off — no scroll surprises, no header flash, composer ready
Draft updates land via N7 update-in-place path: same quoteId, status remains 'draft', no duplicate Quote rows
Header live region announces status changes; auto-scroll behavior is 'smooth' for arrivals but instant on initial mount
